baseline.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, sequential async surface collection
baseline.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs using collectBoundedCodegraphSummaryWithGate(project) followed by buildN8nAutomationSnapshot(project)

result.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, parallel async surface collection
result.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs using Promise.all over collectBoundedCodegraphSummaryWithGate(project) and buildN8nAutomationSnapshot(project)

environment.note: Absolute gain is small in the current environment because n8n is not configured, but the concurrency boundary is now real and scales with slower external surfaces.
